title: TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM - 211info
text: LAKE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and treats tuberculosis (TB) disease. Screens tuberculosis case contacts and provides medical case management for those who test positive. 1250 S 9th Street Lakeview, OR 97630 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (541) 947-6045 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 947-6045 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: May vary, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lake County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Case/Care Management * Tuberculosis Tuberculosis Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN APPLICATION ASSISTANCE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION SPECIALTY MEDICINE - FLUORIDE VARNISH PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LAKE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
